roa.docketEntryComment: DA NON OPP TO MOTION TO SET ASIDE PLEA FILED
DEFT'S PC1473,7 MOTION VACATE CONVICTION FILED

/CAL: MOTION TO VACATE PURSUANT TO PC1473,7; DA NON-OPP TO SET ASIDE/X: THE PEOPLE DO NOT OPPOSE PETITIONER'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE GUILTY PLEA, ENTER A NOT GUILTY PLEA AND SET ASIDE THE CONVICTION AND SENTENCE OF OCTOBER2ND, 2008/MO GRTD/X: PLEA DATE:10-02-2008/X: SENTENCE DATE:10-02-2008/ /X: THE COURT FINDS DEFENDANT WAS NOT PROPERLY ADVISED OF THE POTENTIAL CONSEQUENCES OF A GUILTY PLEA, /CTORD: THE CONVICTION AND SENTENCE WERE ILLEGAL AND INVALID,  PREJUDICIAL ERROR DAMAGED THE DEFENDANT,  ACCORDINGLY, THEGUILTY PLEA ENTERED ON 10-02-2008 IS SET ASIDE A NOT GUILTY PLEA IS ENTERED, THE SENTENCE ENTERED ON 10-02-2008 ARE HEREBY VACATED, /X: THERE BEING NO NEW PLEA ENTERED, THE COURT ORDERS THE MATTER DISMISSED/MO PC 1385: INTEREST OF JUSTICE/X: ORDER SIGNED AND FILED/
